notes: v1.14.103 - Ref card polish (CSS-only): lift the legacy .qa-btn glassy fill recipe into the .rf-card grid cards, parameterized through the per-card --rfac accent via color-mix. Cards now read lifted/glassy like the DEPLOY/HANDOFF tiles: white-from-top gradient (rgba(255,255,255,.10)->accent), white inset top edge (inset 0 2px 0), drop shadow + accent outer glow; brighter bloom on :active. Single .rf-card rule + :active; markup, corner brackets (--rfac), icons, names/meta, and onclick routes all unchanged. body.rd-gated; legacy (?legacy=1 / ?redesign=0) byte-identical.
